texto: Knowing the Techniques of Survival........Our fears and anxieties will often drive us to build impenetrable walls that act like blinders deflecting others and preventing us from seeing who surrounds us. Getting focused to the things that matter are the Key to what has to be to COMPLETE our MISSION. "I Had Every Excuse to Fail but I Chose None" Speak Life!!!(sky)
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sebastian K. Young: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Knowing the Techniques of Survival........Our fears and anxieties will often drive us to build im…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, despair, focus pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e focus.
